step_rationale: IGF signaling modulates plaque inflammation and extracellular matrix remodeling.
mechanism: IGFBP6 regulates insulin-like growth factor availability during plaque inflammation and fibrous-cap degradation.

references.title: Prior Exposure to Experimental Preeclampsia Increases Atherosclerotic Plaque Inflammation in Atherogenic Mice-Brief Report.
Discovery of potential plasma protein biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction via proteomics.

omics_datasets.title: Endothelial IGFBP6 Suppresses Vascular Inflammation and Atherosclerosis
